mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates eliminate discount rate pressure on equity valuations, generating consistently positive forward returns as liquidity supports asset prices.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month decline in the unemployment rate signals rapid labor market stabilization, reducing recession fears and triggering positive equity momentum over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are non-positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE remains above 10%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, which directly boosts corporate earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when either series shows month-over-month contraction, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production above 90 confirms manufacturing capacity utilization has stabilized, supporting a sustained earnings recovery that translates to positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >50% of observations when INDPRO exceeds 90, or the signal reverses during supply-chain constrained regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Ultra-low policy rates combined with elevated unemployment create a liquidity-driven rebound where market pricing decouples from fundamentals, generating short-term positive returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect vanishes when FEDFUNDS rises above 0.50%.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate profit margins, producing a persistent positive drift in equity markets.
failure_condition: Forward returns show no significant positive correlation with GDPC1 growth, or the signal turns negative during inflationary expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll gain exceeding 500,000 signals aggressive labor market tightening, which raises wage inflation expectations and compresses equity valuations over the quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive in >65% of triggered instances, or the negative signal fails to materialize when CPIAUCSL growth is below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Low policy rates amid rising price indices signal accommodative monetary policy that fuels financial asset inflation, driving positive forward returns until central banks pivot.
failure_condition: The signal predicts negative returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds 260.0, or forward returns are non-positive in >50% of triggered observations.
